category_sources: source_facts.description describes subdomain enumeration and wildcard-aware resolving; official GitHub README describes shuffleDNS as a massDNS wrapper for active subdomain bruteforce and resolving.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README styles the project as shuffleDNS; source_facts.name is shuffledns.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; its README contains usage, prerequisites, installation, and examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/projectdiscovery/shuffledns, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists DNS resolution, subdomain bruteforcing, wildcard handling, and massDNS integration.
